enableWindowsSelection.label: Enable Window Detection
enableWindowsSelection.description: Allow clicking windows to auto-select their region on supported compositors.

screenshotEditor.label: Screenshot Annotation Tool
screenshotEditor.description: Tool used for annotating screenshots. Needs to be pre-installed.

keepSourceScreenshot.label: Keep Source Screenshot
keepSourceScreenshot.description: Keep the temporary *_source.png file after saving the edited screenshot.

savePath.label: Screenshot Save Folder
savePath.description: Folder where edited screenshots are saved.

recordingSavePath.label: Recording Save Folder
recordingSavePath.description: Folder where screen recordings are saved.

recordingNotifications.label: Recording Notifications
recordingNotifications.description: Show notifications when recording starts/stops or errors occur.

notify.dependencyMissing: A required dependency is not installed.

screenshot.niriNotSupported: Niri is not supported for screenshots.
